overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a foggy, post-apocalyptic urban street in a video game (Fallout 4). The scene features abandoned brick buildings with a prominent 'NOW LEASING' banner, scattered debris, and a distinctive green radioactive haze atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned post-apocalyptic main street with derelict brick buildings

agents.ego_description: cautiously advancing down the foggy deserted street, observing the abandoned surroundings and decaying architecture

entered.detail: black iron fence adorned with small string lights, partially obscured by debris
tall wooden telephone pole with crossbars, leaning slightly
scattered rubble and broken materials piled along the sidewalk
multi-story red brick building with boarded-up windows and fire escapes
large yellow banner with black text reading 'NOW LEASING' draped across the building facade
leafless dead trees silhouetted against the green fog in the distance
curved black street lamp post with unlit fixture

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly forward through a desolate post-apocalyptic city street enveloped in green fog. On the left, a fenced area with string lights and debris piles passes by, while on the right, a prominent brick building with a large 'NOW LEASING' banner dominates the view. The street is empty of all life, with only dead trees visible in the foggy distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a desolate urban street that remains shrouded in a thick, radioactive green haze. It begins by gliding past a fenced area on the left, where string lights hang over piles of scattered debris. As the camera advances, the view is dominated by a weathered brick building on the right featuring a prominent NOW LEASING banner. The scene then extends further into the empty thoroughfare, moving toward a horizon where the silhouettes of dead trees emerge from the dense fog.
